task: place green can into bottom drawer
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A green can is on a gray countertop next to a blue can and a bowl. The bottom drawer is open. The green can is a rigid cylinder with a top opening. STRATEGY - Reach the green can, grasp it, transport it to the open drawer, and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the can during transport or misaligning it with the drawer. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the can body; Step 2 grasp the can body for secure hold; Step 3 transport above the drawer; Step 4 lower into the drawer and release.

Goal: inside(green_can, bottom_drawer)
Scene: green_can, blue_can, bowl, bottom_drawer
Step 1: reach(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_can) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: holding(green_can) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_can)
Step 3: transport(green_can -> bottom_drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the bottom drawer
  spatial: above(green_can, bottom_drawer, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_can)
  done_when: above(green_can, bottom_drawer, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_can -> bottom_drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the bottom drawer
  contact: surface_contact(green_can, bottom_drawer) [completion]; released(green_can) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_can) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_can, bottom_drawer) AND released(green_can)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green can
the body of the green can
an empty area inside the bottom drawer
